name: A Man with Wdjat
name_jp: ウジャト<ruby lang="jp"><rb>眼</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>がん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>を<ruby lang="jp"><rb>持</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>も</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>つ<ruby lang="jp"><rb>男</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>おとこ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
name_jp_tl: Man with the Eye of Wdjat
desc: When you Normal Summon this card, and during each of your Standby Phases, select 1 Set card on your opponent's side of the field. Pick it up and look at it, then return it to its original position.
mnst_eff: When you Normal Summon this card, and during each of your Standby Phases, select 1 Set card on your opponent's side of the field. Pick it up and look at it, then return it to its original position.
eff: When you Normal Summon this card, and during each of your Standby Phases, select 1 Set card on your opponent's side of the field. Pick it up and look at it, then return it to its original position.
